name: Alex Friedrichsen
tagline: Solo dev, MTG pro, Wonders of the First creator. Builds tools that help people.
general: I'm an AI-augmented software builder running HonestAlexF LLC out of Boston. Most of what I do sits at the intersection of three things I can't shake: hard problems I find joyful, friends I want to grow with, and tools that make somebody's day better.

Before code, it was Magic — years on the grind, one Pro Tour Top 8, one SCG Constructed Champion. The same instincts that worked there (study, iterate, ship, ask better questions) are the ones I bring to building software now.
philosophy: Grow with friends. Find joy in hard problems. Build things that help people.
Three sentences I keep coming back to. Everything I build is a small bet on whether one person plus a team of agents can hold all three at once.
Hard problems are more fun in good company. Joy in the struggle is the only sustainable engine. And the work only matters if it helps somebody on the other end.
